title: Mace 3D - hammer version
description: Unleash the power of epic weaponry with my custom 3D Mace models, now available for your Minecraft adventures! This pack features two distinct mace designs. You can choose and download any file to suit your preferences.
body:
_**Unleash the power of epic weaponry with my custom 3D Mace models, now available for your Minecraft adventures! This pack features two distinct mace designs. You can choose and download any file to suit your preferences.**_

## **1. Enchanced mace version with the look like an hammer**
![Hammer version of mace 3d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9209137b0420ded0e2579ac72a767e33025cac5.png)

## **2. Normal version of mace but in 3D**
![Normal version of mace 3d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c85b9e99e0bd0e6a64942d9f0a0689f35ba9133.png)

[Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-mace-3d) to download the normal version of mace

_Download now and take your Minecraft combat to the next level with these meticulously crafted 3D Mace models!_
